response.justification: The candidate lacks the mandatory C++ development experience on the Windows platform, with no clear evidence of 5–10 years of hands-on C++ work in capital markets or fixed-income systems. While they have strong general software development skills and experience with other languages (D, JavaScript, TypeScript), their domain expertise does not align with the required financial-sector focus. SQL experience is present but not explicitly tied to SQL Server or Oracle.
strengths: Strong general software development skills across multiple languages and platforms
Experience with low-latency systems and high-performance databases
Proven ability to learn and adapt to new technologies quickly
concerns: No demonstrated C++ development on Windows platform (mandatory requirement)
Lack of fixed-income or capital markets domain expertise
No evidence of SQL Server or Oracle experience specifically
